years_with_crohns.evidence: diagnosed with Crohn's about seven years ago

treatment_journey.name: prednisone
treatment_journey.evidence: Started on prednisone and mesalamine. Prednisone made me rage. Almost lost my job from snapping at supervisor. Got off that quick.

treatment_journey.name: sulfasalazine
treatment_journey.evidence: Tried sulfasalazine, gave me killer headaches.

treatment_journey.name: methotrexate
treatment_journey.evidence: Then methotrexate, made me so nauseous I couldn't work.

treatment_journey.name: Remicade
treatment_journey.evidence: Then stopped working completely. Switched to Humira.

treatment_journey.name: Humira
treatment_journey.evidence: Been on Humira three years now.

pathway_endpoint.reasoning: Been on Humira three years now.

referral_pathway.name: doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: Wife finally made me see doctor when I dropped 20 pounds.
